title: GMS Week 25 - LANDMARK WEEK…AHEAD!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/06/2025
Image reference: 2025-06-23_gms-week-25-landmark-weekahead_img1.jpg
The world watched in disbelief as the U.S. carried out a major attack on 3 Iranian nuclear sites and while claiming destruction of the facilitiesdespite awaiting BDA (Battle Damage Assessment), early indications seem to suggest that the primary facility may still be intact. And while this strike was conducted over the weekend, the tension surrounding the possibility of an attack saw the BDI (Baltic Exchange Dry Index) fall a massive 3.5% down to its lowest level seen over the last 2 weeks, erasing a majority of recent gains as Friday closed.
